title: Bitcoin Difficulty Falls 2.3% as Hashrate Slips Below 1 ZH/s and Block Times Slow
summary:
1. This week, the Bitcoin network recorded its second consecutive difficulty reduction, easing another 2.3% on May 1 after the April 17 epoch posted a 2.43% decline.
2. Hashrate has also trended lower, now resting beneath the 1 zettahash per second (ZH/s) threshold.
3. Key Takeaways: Bitcoin difficulty fell 2.3% on May 1, marking 6 cuts in 2026 […]

title: Americans still prefer banks over crypto for financial access, CoinDesk's survey shows

title: Stablecoins Reach $321B Market Cap as $1B Inflows Lift Sector to New High
summary:
1. Following a week marked by an absence of both inflows and outflows, the stablecoin economy recorded $1.08 billion in inflows from April 26 through May 3.
2. Data further indicates that, as of Sunday, the sector’s total market valuation stands at $321.759 billion, based on figures logged by defillama.com.
3. Key Takeaways: Stablecoin market hits $321.759B after […]

title: Latam Insights: Brazil Bans Crypto Transfers as Meta Launches USDC Payouts
summary:
1. Welcome to Latam Insights, a compilation of the most relevant crypto news from Latin America over the past week.
2. In this edition, Brazil’s central bank issues a resolution banning the use of crypto rails in regulated cross-border payments, Bitso estimates 40% of all crypto purchases include stablecoins, and Meta launches USDC payments in Colombia.
